content_body: Thank you so much for such a wonderful and well-appointed cabin! We had a fun family weekend with grandparents, children, and grandchildren. The views are exceptional and we took a few of our younger crewon a tube float down the Toccoa which was their first time ever doing this. It was so close to everything, but just far enough away. We appreciate you also supplying the games - Uno was the biggest hit! Love this space and hope to visit again! - The Cocoles and the Treibles
title: Close To Everything!
